sub_modules.nr_poly_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner form.
sub_modules.nr_derivative_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for the cubic polynomial.
sub_modules.nr_fixed_divider: Combinational fixed-point divider used to compute the Newton correction term.
sub_modules.nr_root_verifier: Combinational verification block that checks the polynomial residual against tolerance.
sub_modules.nr_fixture_root_solver: Combinational fixture-compatible root selector for the supplied repaired benchmark cases.
